description: The act of passing through or across; a journey from one place or state to another. 'Phaero' names the crossing—the passage between, the journey through, the movement from here to there.
sound_symbolism: The word moves through. 'Pha' /ɸa/ begins with breath in motion, passage starting. The vowel 'e' opens to the between-space. Then 'ro' rolls onward, transit continuing.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo phaero' (the transit). Can describe physical travel or metaphorical transition between states.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: All existence is transit—nothing remains fixed, everything is in passage from one state to another.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Transit times were vulnerable—the journey between safe places required vigilance and preparation.
